name: Vapman Concentrate Screen (2x)
summary: Unlock new ways to enjoy your Vapman with the Vapman Concentrate Screens.
description: Unlock new ways to enjoy your Vapman with the Vapman Concentrate Screens. Designed for clean, efficient vaporisation of extracts and resins, these stainless steel screens deliver smooth, flavorful results while keeping your vaporiser perfectly clean. Each screen is crafted from high-grade stainless steel to ensure even heat distribution and pure taste. The fine mesh allows ideal airflow while preventing residue buildup, letting you enjoy dense, satisfying vapour from your favorite concentrates. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
